subcodes.first_line: O blessed branch of the Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing! May God illumine thy countenance with the radiant lights of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المبارک من سدره المنتهی نور الله وجهک بالانوار الساطعه من ملکوت الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
